title: Command
description: A single lamp command emitted by the Worker and consumed by the Mac agent.

action.description: on/off toggle power; set turns the lamp on and adjusts brightness/color (it cannot change brightness/color while the lamp stays off).

brightness.description: Lamp brightness percent. Meaningful for 'on' and 'set'.

color_temp_k.description: Lamp color temperature in Kelvin (warm 2700 ↔ cool 6500). The Mac agent clamps to the accessory's advertised range. Meaningful for 'on' and 'set'.

duration_minutes.description: Reserved for future scheduling feature. Ignored in v1.

source_msg_id.description: Gmail message ID; for audit and idempotency.
